Header.title: We Code your Ideas
Header.paragraph: Forget Past Mistakes. Forget Failures. Forget Everything except what you're going to do now and to do it.

About.paragraph: At WinnyWeb we design and build digital products that fit how your business works: web and mobile apps, integrations, cloud setups, and online commerce. From discovery through launch and ongoing improvements, we focus on clear communication, solid engineering, and outcomes you can measure.

Services.name: Web Application
Services.text: Responsive web apps and sites using React, Vue, Angular, and proven modern stacks.

Services.name: Mobile App Development
Services.text: iOS and Android apps designed for smooth, reliable user experiences.

Services.name: E-Commerce Solutions
Services.text: Online stores with product pages, checkout, and secure payment setup.

Services.name: Cloud Infrastructure
Services.text: AWS, Azure, and cloud setup, deployment, monitoring, and management.

Services.name: AI-Driven Development
Services.text: Smart web and app solutions powered by AI tools and intelligent features.

Services.name: Workflow Automation
Services.text: Automate repetitive business tasks to save time and reduce errors.

Services.name: API Integration
Services.text: Custom APIs that connect your app to CMS and backends, with CI/CD-friendly releases.

Services.name: Optimization and evolution
Services.text: Ongoing tuning, quick fixes when needed, and steady releases as your product evolves.

Services.name: UX/UI Designer
Services.text: Intuitive UX, strong visuals, and responsive layouts across desktop and mobile.

Testimonials.text: "Hands down, one of the best developers I have ever worked with. He is consistent, thorough and comprehends everything that needs to be done. If you need someone to get your project off the ground. Nabeel is the one to go to!"
Testimonials.name: Makarchuk

Testimonials.text: "We had so many revisions along the way, and had to extend our deadline multiple times because of our own delays. Nabeel was nothing but professional, and extremely patient in letting us figure out and make changes to the final product. This is the second time we have used him and will continue to use him on projects in the future."
Testimonials.name: Johnathan

Testimonials.text: "Great Hamza, I was delighted to work with him. Very comprehensive React app built and professionally implemented. Will work with him again for sure. Highly recommended.."
Testimonials.name: Dean Flanagan
